chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI H.C.A. No.229 of 2023 Mrs. Hailey Vincent D’Abreo & others Versus Province of Sindh & another Date Order with signature of Judge 1. For orders on CMA 2347/23 2. For hearing of main case. 3. For orders on CMA 2348/23 Dated: 16.01.2025 Mr. S. Arshad Ali holding brief for Mr. Shehanshah Hussain, learned counsel appearing for the appellants, submits that he has been instructed not to press this appeal. The appeal as such is dismissed as not pressed along with listed applications. Chief Justice Judge
